title: Slay the Spire 2 is out now in Early Access with online co-op
contents:
Slay the Spire 2 has officially launched into Early Access giving us a taste of the latest deck-builder that can be played solo or online with up to 4 players.

Read the full article here: https://www.gamingonlinux.com/2026/03/slay-the-spire-2-is-out-now-in-early-access/
